title: The Mountains of Madness
lines: You step through the swirling amethyst tear in reality.
Gravity shifts violently. The damp cave air is instantly replaced by a blinding, sub-zero blizzard.
You look up and the nightmare truly begins. Carved into the impossible, jagged peaks piercing the clouds are cyclopean, ancient ruins.
Above them, entirely alien, black stars cast a sickly glow over the frozen wasteland.
You escaped the zombie apocalypse... only to arrive at the Mountains of Madness.

options.desc: Venture deeper into the frozen mountain pass
